mentions.note: Cruise lines first to be battered, first to recover. Travel recovery play; bargain vacation positioning supports upside on ceasefire.
Oil-sensitive stock caught in dangerous geopolitical trading trap on Iran peace rumors; Cramer warns against speculative trading without edge; prefer Viking for long-term hold.
Likes low multiple and fundamentals but prefers Viking Holdings for next 5 years; 'come sail away with Viking' for superior execution and upside.
Well-run cruise operator; will report soon with first inkling of lower fuel cost and destination reopening impacts. Never told anyone not to buy it.
Upgraded today; reservations coming through; inexpensive valuation; earnings support thesis of resilient leisure demand.
Cruise group strong now; but cancellations expected next year as war continues; watch Friday earnings for consumer sentiment read.
Cruise line down 3%; consumer pullback from leisure travel evident.
